description: Horizons Patch 1 (6 November 2024) — Alternate Mount-up toggle, Crystal Creatures changes, Journal changes, Dynamic Encampments Adjustments, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, Misc), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Alternate Mount-up: Running back to a mount when using the Mount ability in the half-mounted radius is now available as a toggle option in the 'General' section of the Controls menu
Crystal Cobra: Some abilities have had their damage and potency reduced
Crystal Beetle: The Lightning Strike ability has had its duration and frequency reduced
Journal mission 'Your voice sounds familiar…' renamed to 'Talk to yourself…' with adjusted reward: 200 Ghost Victory Emote Charges → Master's Tome of Insight

Dynamic Encampments: Mobs no longer have a Fame penalty (significant increase in Fame per mob); Fame required to complete objective increased proportionally; Fame can no longer be gained from mobs after objective is completed or if player is outside Encampment area; Tomes of Insight removed from Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary Caches; Common Caches renamed to 'Common Tome Caches'; Might conversions increased (partially offset by reduced objective Might reward); changes also apply to Mists Camps; Solo Caches in Open World Dynamic Encampments have had their loot values (excluding Tomes of Insight) substantially increased
sections.searchable_text: Alternate Mount-up toggle Controls menu Crystal Cobra abilities damage potency Crystal Beetle Lightning Strike duration frequency Journal mission Talk to yourself Ghost Victory Emote Charges Master's Tome of Insight Dynamic Encampments Fame penalty mobs objective Tomes of Insight Uncommon Rare Legendary Caches Common Tome Caches Might Mists Camps Solo Caches loot

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where using the last food or potion while a recastable spell was active would prevent the spell from being recast
[Desktop] Fixed issue where increasing the size of party markers would not affect mob markers
[Mobile] Fixed issue that altered the default spell button order in the Virtual Joystick layout
[Mobile] Fixed issue where a section of the Guild Members list would not display correctly
Fixed issue where the Inventory UI could open unexpectedly
Fixed issue that could prevent the avatar and items in the Inventory UI from displaying
Fixed issue where an Awakened item shared in chat could display incorrectly
Fixed issue where binding a new key would not override the previous one
Fixed issue where internal tags would be visible in the warning tooltip for blocked Hideout placements
Fixed issue where the minimap would not be visible in 20v20 Arena matches
Fixed issue where the Faction Outpost's contested animation would not display properly in the World Map
Fixed issue where some HUD elements could disappear when entering Randomized Dungeons
Fixed issue where the Item Power of the player challenging to a duel would not be displayed
Fixed issue where the chat size would reset after making changes to the HUD
Fixed issue where the Fame gained from various activities would not be displayed in overhead messages or the combat log
Fixed issue where Dynamic Resource Hotspots could spawn resources of a lower tier than expected
Fixed issue where Enchanted resources would not display their special effects in Dynamic Resource Hotspots
Fixed issue where the S.A.F.E. Portal's location on the Region Map would not always update after maintenance
Fixed issue where completing a higher level of the Journal mission 'Visit a Guild Island' would not complete the corresponding lower levels
[Mobile] Multiple fixes: Outland Banks visibility, Group Dungeons entrances in Roads of Avalon and Hallowed Ground, Android update/launch, Book Chests visibility
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
